name: Texas Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the beaten eggs, oil, biscuit mix, zucchini, salt, and seasoning salt until well combined.
2. Stir in the chopped onion and parsley.
3. Fold in the grated cheddar cheese.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x11-inch baking dish.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until bubbly and golden brown.
Serves 6 to 8 people.
